children.name: Seigneur De Barbençon Jean 1er De Barbançon

zh.lifeSummary: Nicolas II De Barbençon是Gilles De Barbençon和Isabelle De Merbes的兒子，出生。他和Isabeau De Soissons-Nesie至少有1個兒子。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Nicolas II De Barbençon是Gilles De Barbençon和Isabelle De Merbes的儿子，出生。他和Isabeau De Soissons-Nesie至少有1个儿子。

nameMeanings.name: De
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Nicolas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Nicholas
meanings: form of the post-classical Greek personal name Nikolaos, derived from nikē ‘victory’ + laos ‘people’. The spelling with -ch- first occurred as early as the 12th century, and became firmly established at the time of the Reformation, although Nicolas is still occasionally found. St Nicholas was a 4th-century bishop of Myra in Lycia, about whom virtually nothing factual is known, although a vast body of legend grew up around him, and he became the patron saint of Greece and of Russia, as well as of children, sailors, merchants, and pawnbrokers. His feast day is 6 December , and among the many roles which legend has assigned to him is that of bringer of Christmas presents, in the guise of ‘Santa Claus’ (an alteration of the Dutch form of his name, Sinterklaas).

nameMeanings.name: II

en.lifeSummary: Nicolas II De Barbençon was born as the son of Gilles De Barbençon and Isabelle De Merbes. He had at least 1 son with Isabeau De Soissons-Nesie.

fr.lifeSummary: Nicolas II De Barbençon est né, fils de Gilles De Barbençon et Isabelle De Merbes. Il a eu au moins 1 fils avec Isabeau De Soissons-Nesie.

de.lifeSummary: Nicolas II De Barbençon wurde, als Sohn von Gilles De Barbençon und Isabelle De Merbes geboren. Er hatte mit Isabeau De Soissons-Nesie mindestens 1 Sohn.

it.lifeSummary: Nicolas II De Barbençon è nato il come figlio di Gilles De Barbençon e Isabelle De Merbes. Lui avuto almeno 1 figlio con Isabeau De Soissons-Nesie.

ja.lifeSummary: Nicolas II De BarbençonはGilles De BarbençonとIsabelle De Merbesの息子として生まれた。彼はIsabeau De Soissons-Nesieとの間に少なくとも1人の息子をもうけた。

ko.lifeSummary: Nicolas II De Barbençon(은)는 Gilles De Barbençon(와)과 Isabelle De Merbes의 아들로 태어났다. 그는 Isabeau De Soissons-Nesie(와)과 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다.

pt.lifeSummary: Nicolas II De Barbençon nasceu filho de Gilles De Barbençon e Isabelle De Merbes. Ele teve pelo menos 1 filho com Isabeau De Soissons-Nesie.

ru.lifeSummary: Nicolas II De Barbençon родился. Его родителей звали Gilles De Barbençon и Isabelle De Merbes. У него был по крайней мере 1 сын от Isabeau De Soissons-Nesie.

es.lifeSummary: Nicolas II De Barbençon nació como hijo de Gilles De Barbençon y Isabelle De Merbes. Tuvo por lo menos 1 hijo con Isabeau De Soissons-Nesie.
